basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for Junior Assistant, Junior Technician and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad
basic_details.post_name: Junior Assistant (Hospitality), Junior Technician (Civil/Electrical Maintenance), Assistant Systems Engineer (Network Administration; HPC & Cloud Management), Junior Technical Superintendent (10 streams)
basic_details.short_information: The IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 notification has been released by the Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad - referred to as IIT (ISM), Dhanbad - for multiple non-teaching posts on Direct Recruitment basis. As per the official advertisements dated 22 June 2026, the recruitment falls under the Notification Released / Application Open stage, with the online application closing on 06 August 2026 (up to 23:59 hrs). This article covers three separate advertisements issued by the same Institute on the same date, sharing a common application portal and c

application_fee.details: Fee is payable through the SBI Collect link available on the Institute website (Select category: Educational Institutions; Filter by State: Jharkhand; Search for Educational Institution: IIT (ISM), Dhanbad). SC/ST/PwDs/Ex-Servicemen/Female candidates are exempted from payment of recruitment fee.

age_limit.details: Junior Assistant (Hospitality), Junior Technician (Civil/Electrical Maintenance): Maximum 30 years Assistant Systems Engineer (both streams): Maximum 40 years Junior Technical Superintendent (all streams): Maximum 35 years | Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates (and OBC-NCL for Junior Technical Superintendent posts) against reserved posts is admissible as per Government of India norms. Candidates serving in the Institute or other IITs/NITs/CFTIs for at least three years on a regular post may get a 5-year age relaxation (not applicable to employees of private organizations). Age relaxation as per Government of India norms is also admissible to regular employees of Central/State Governments, Ex-Servicemen, and PwD/Divyang candidates. The closing date of application submission is the cut-off date for age, educational qualification, and experience.

qualification.details: For all Junior Technical Superintendent posts, candidates should also have experience working in MS-Office and other computer software relevant to their area of specialization. Detailed desirable experience for each stream is available in the official notification.

salary_details.details: Exact basic pay/grade pay figures are not specified in the notification beyond the Pay Level; candidates should refer to the official 7th CPC Pay Matrix for full salary details.

selection_process: Junior Assistant / Junior Technician / Junior Technical Superintendent: Preliminary shortlisting based on essential qualifications and experience
followed by Written Test and Trade Test/Computer Proficiency Test as per Recruitment Rules of IIT (ISM)
Dhanbad. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in recruitment tests. Assistant Systems Engineer: Preliminary shortlisting based on essential qualifications and experience
followed by Presentation and Interview before the Selection Committee. Written Test and Computer/other Test may also be conducted as per Recruitment Rules
if required. To-and-fro rail fare (AC-3 tier
shortest route) is reimbursable only for candidates shortlisted for Presentation and Interview.

Fulfillment of qualifications alone does not entitle a candidate to be called for the selection process. The Institute reserves the right to place a reasonable limit on the number of candidates called.
how_to_apply: Visit the Non-Faculty Recruitment (NFR) portal: nfr.iitism.ac.in
Register using a valid, active mobile number and email address.
Fill in the online application form carefully as no changes are permitted after submission.
Upload a single combined PDF of educational qualification proofs and a single combined PDF of all experience certificates.
Pay the applicable recruitment fee through the SBI Collect link (if not exempted).
Submit the application on or before 06 August 2026 (up to 23:59 hrs).
important_instructions: Applications received after the closing date and incomplete applications will be summarily rejected. Non-possession of essential qualifications and experience will lead to disqualification. Applicants must furnish complete and accurate particulars relating to past employment; concealment or misrepresentation detected at any stage may lead to appropriate action. Candidates presently employed in Government/PSU/Autonomous Body roles must submit an NOC; applications without NOC will be treated as Advance Copy, and NOC must be submitted at the time of selection/interview, failing which candidature may be cancelled. Legal disputes, if any, are restricted to the jurisdiction of Dhanbad only. Candidates are advised to apply well before the last date to avoid last-minute technical issues.

content_sections.heading: Quick Highlights
content_sections.text: Organization: Indian Institute of Technology (Indian School of Mines), Dhanbad (IIT (ISM), Dhanbad) Post Name: Junior Assistant (Hospitality), Junior Technician (Civil/Electrical Maintenance), Assistant Systems Engineer (Network Administration; HPC & Cloud Management), Junior Technical Superintendent (10 streams) Total Vacancies: 4 (Junior Assistant Hospitality) + 2 (Junior Technician Civil) + 3 (Junior Technician Electrical) + 1 (Assistant Systems Engineer – Network Administration) + 1 (Assistant Systems Engineer – HPC & Cloud Management) + 27 (Junior Technical Superintendent, all streams combined) Apply Mode: Online Start Date: Not Announced Yet Last Date: 06 August 2026 (up to 23:59 hrs) Qualification: Varies by post - Diploma/Bachelor's Degree in relevant discipline (see Eligibility section) Age Limit: Varies by post - 30/35/40 years (see Age Limit section)

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF and Official Website
content_sections.text: Official Notification (Junior Assistant/Junior Technician) - Advt. No. 411002/3/2026-NFR, dated 22 June 2026 Official Notification (Assistant Systems Engineer) - Advt. No. 411002/4/2026-NFR, dated 22 June 2026 Official Notification (Junior Technical Superintendent) - Advt. No. 411002/2/2026-NFR, dated 22 June 2026 Official Website: www.iitism.ac.in Application Portal: nfr.iitism.ac.in

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_indian_sc: Junior Assistant (Hospitality), Junior Technician (Civil/Electrical Maintenance), Assistant Systems Engineer (Network Administration; HPC & Cloud Management), Junior Technical Superintendent (10 streams)

content_sections.heading: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Note: # denotes Backlog Vacancy. Two (02) posts of Junior Assistant (Hospitality) are reserved for persons with benchmark disabilities under categories (a), (b), (c) and (e) as defined in the notification. These posts are also suitable for Divyang candidates with Low Vision, Hard of Hearing, or Locomotor disability (including cerebral palsy, leprosy cured, dwarfism, acid attack victims and muscular dystrophy). Note: # denotes Backlog Vacancy. Out of the total 27 vacancies, four (04) are reserved for Divyang (specially abled) candidates under categories (a), (b), (c) and (e). The posts of Junior Technical Superintendent across all streams fall under a common cadre with a single reservation roster.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: For all Junior Technical Superintendent posts, candidates should also have experience working in MS-Office and other computer software relevant to their area of specialization. Detailed desirable experience for each stream is available in the official notification.

rows.essential_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Hotel Management and Catering Technology with 55% marks from a recognized institution/university, OR Three (03) years Diploma in Hotel Management & Catering Technology with 55% marks and two (02) years' experience. Desirable: Experience in a residential educational institution.

Diploma (minimum 55% marks) in Civil Engineering of 3 years duration from a recognized Polytechnic/Institute, with 5 years of relevant experience in any large residential campus, and knowledge of computer office applications. Desirable: Experience in maintaining Civil Infrastructure of a large residential campus of an educational institute or industry of repute.

Diploma (minimum 55% marks) in Electrical Engineering of 3 years duration from a recognized Polytechnic/Institute, with 5 years of relevant experience in any large residential campus, and knowledge of computer office applications. Desirable: Experience in maintaining Electrical Infrastructure of a large residential campus of an educational institute or industry of repute.

1st Class B.E./B.Tech/ M.Sc . in CS/ECE/IT/Software Science/EE/EEE/MCA or equivalent with 6 years relevant experience in Pay Level-7 in a Govt. organisation/Institute or reputed Computer Organisation/Industry, OR First Class M.E./M.Tech in the same disciplines with 4 years' experience in Pay Level-7.

1st Class B.E./B.Tech/M.Sc. in CS/ECE/IT/Software Science/EE/EEE/MCA or equivalent with 6 years relevant experience in Pay Level-7 in a Govt. organisation/Institute or reputed Computer Organisation/Industry, OR First Class M.E./M.Tech in the same disciplines with 4 years' experience in Pay Level-7.
Three years' Diploma in Networking/Systems Administration or B.Sc. in Information Security (min. 55% marks) with 4 years relevant experience in revised Pay Level-5 or equivalent.
Bachelor of Science in Chemistry (min. 55% marks) with 4 years relevant experience in revised Pay Level-5 or equivalent.
Three years' Diploma in Electrical Engineering/related disciplines (min. 55% marks) with 4 years relevant experience in revised Pay Level-5 or equivalent.
Three years' Diploma in Civil Engineering (min. 55% marks) with 4 years relevant experience in revised Pay Level-5 or equivalent.
Three years' Diploma in Architecture (min. 55% marks) with 4 years relevant experience in revised Pay Level-5 or equivalent.

Three years' Diploma in Mechanical/Production/Aerospace/Power Plant/Industrial/Mechatronics/Robotics/CAD-CAM-CAE/Automobile Engineering (min. 55% marks) with 4 years relevant experience in revised Pay Level-5 or equivalent.
B.Sc. in Physics (min. 55% marks) with 4 years relevant experience in revised Pay Level-5 or equivalent.

Three years' Diploma in Electronics/ECE/Electrical & Instrumentation/Embedded System/VLSI/Semiconductor or B.Sc. in Electronics Engineering (min. 55% marks) with 4 years relevant experience in revised Pay Level-5 or equivalent.

Three years' Diploma in Computer Science/IT/Computer Science or B.Sc. in Computer Science/IT/Computer Application (min. 55% marks) with 4 years relevant experience in revised Pay Level-5 or equivalent.
Three years' Diploma in Chemical Engineering/Chemical Technology (min. 55% marks) with 4 years relevant experience in revised Pay Level-5 or equivalent.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Junior Assistant (Hospitality), Junior Technician (Civil/Electrical Maintenance): Maximum 30 years Assistant Systems Engineer (both streams): Maximum 40 years Junior Technical Superintendent (all streams): Maximum 35 years Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates (and OBC-NCL for Junior Technical Superintendent posts) against reserved posts is admissible as per Government of India norms. Candidates serving in the Institute or other IITs/NITs/CFTIs for at least three years on a regular post may get a 5-year age relaxation (not applicable to employees of private organizations). Age relaxation as per Government of India norms is also admissible to regular employees of Central/State Governments, Ex-Servicemen, and PwD/Divyang candidates. The closing date of application submission is the cut-off date for age, educational qualification, and experience.

content_sections.heading: Salary/Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Exact basic pay/grade pay figures are not specified in the notification beyond the Pay Level; candidates should refer to the official 7th CPC Pay Matrix for full salary details.

rows.post: Assistant Systems Engineer (Network Administration; HPC & Cloud Management)

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee is payable through the SBI Collect link available on the Institute website (Select category: Educational Institutions; Filter by State: Jharkhand; Search for Educational Institution: IIT (ISM), Dhanbad). SC/ST/PwDs/Ex-Servicemen/Female candidates are exempted from payment of recruitment fee.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Junior Assistant / Junior Technician / Junior Technical Superintendent: Preliminary shortlisting based on essential qualifications and experience, followed by Written Test and Trade Test/Computer Proficiency Test as per Recruitment Rules of IIT (ISM), Dhanbad. No TA/DA will be paid for appearing in recruitment tests. Assistant Systems Engineer: Preliminary shortlisting based on essential qualifications and experience, followed by Presentation and Interview before the Selection Committee. Written Test and Computer/other Test may also be conducted as per Recruitment Rules, if required. To-and-fro rail fare (AC-3 tier, shortest route) is reimbursable only for candidates shortlisted for Presentation and Interview. Fulfillment of qualifications alone does not entitle a candidate to be called for the selection process. The Institute reserves the right to place a reasonable limit on the number of candidates called.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Proof of educational qualification (single combined PDF) Experience certificates (single combined PDF) Caste/EWS Certificate (for SC/ST/OBC-NCL/EWS candidates, in the latest Government of India format; OBC-NCL/EWS certificates must be issued on or after 01.04.2026) No Objection Certificate (NOC), for candidates presently employed in Central/State Government, Union Territory Administration, Central/State Autonomous Bodies, or Central/State PSUs Pay Equivalence Certificate (for Assistant Systems Engineer candidates whose experience certificate mentions pay scales other than Central Govt. Pay Scales/CDA pattern)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Visit the Non-Faculty Recruitment (NFR) portal: nfr.iitism.ac.in Register using a valid, active mobile number and email address. Fill in the online application form carefully as no changes are permitted after submission. Upload a single combined PDF of educational qualification proofs and a single combined PDF of all experience certificates. Pay the applicable recruitment fee through the SBI Collect link (if not exempted). Submit the application on or before 06 August 2026 (up to 23:59 hrs).

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications received after the closing date and incomplete applications will be summarily rejected. Non-possession of essential qualifications and experience will lead to disqualification. Applicants must furnish complete and accurate particulars relating to past employment; concealment or misrepresentation detected at any stage may lead to appropriate action. Candidates presently employed in Government/PSU/Autonomous Body roles must submit an NOC; applications without NOC will be treated as Advance Copy, and NOC must be submitted at the time of selection/interview, failing which candidature may be cancelled. Legal disputes, if any, are restricted to the jurisdiction of Dhanbad only. Candidates are advised to apply well before the last date to avoid last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q1. What is IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a Direct Recruitment drive by IIT (ISM), Dhanbad to fill non-teaching posts including Junior Assistant, Junior Technician, Assistant Systems Engineer, and Junior Technical Superintendent, announced through three separate advertisements dated 22 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application last date for all three advertisements is 06 August 2026, up to 23:59 hrs.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in IIT (ISM) Dhanbad recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 4 vacancies for Junior Assistant (Hospitality), 2 for Junior Technician (Civil Maintenance), 3 for Junior Technician (Electrical Maintenance), 1 each for the two Assistant Systems Engineer posts, and 27 vacancies across 10 streams of Junior Technical Superintendent.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad non-teaching posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years for Junior Assistant/Junior Technician posts, 35 years for Junior Technical Superintendent posts, and 40 years for Assistant Systems Engineer posts, as on the closing date of application.

faq.question: Q5. What is the qualification required for Junior Technical Superintendent at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: Qualification varies by stream, generally requiring a three-year Diploma or B.Sc. in the relevant discipline with minimum 55% marks and 4 years of relevant experience in Pay Level-5 or equivalent. Refer to the Educational Qualification table above for stream-wise details.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is ₹500/- for Junior Assistant, Junior Technician, and Junior Technical Superintendent posts, and ₹1000/- for Assistant Systems Engineer posts. SC/ST/PwDs/Ex-Servicemen/Female candidates are exempted.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad non-teaching posts?
faq.answer: Junior Assistant, Junior Technician, and Junior Technical Superintendent candidates undergo a Written Test and Trade Test/Computer Proficiency Test. Assistant Systems Engineer candidates undergo a Presentation and Interview before the Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the pay level for Assistant Systems Engineer at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: Both Assistant Systems Engineer posts (Network Administration and HPC & Cloud Management) are placed at Pay Level-10 of the 7th CPC Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q9. How to apply online for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the Non-Faculty Recruitment module at nfr.iitism.ac.in, upload the required documents, pay the applicable fee, and submit the form before 06 August 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Are SC/ST/PwD/Ex-servicemen/female candidates exempted from application fee?
faq.answer: Yes, SC, ST, PwDs, Ex-Servicemen, and Female candidates are exempted from payment of the recruitment fee across all three advertisements.

title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for Junior Assistant, Junior Technician and More Posts
